summary: Attempt 3 verifies migration and launch-readiness enforcement for exclusive Codex OAuth profile capacity, but the complete target remains missing shared leasing, profile-bound hosts and routing, destination preflight, durable lifecycle cleanup/recovery, diagnostics, and boundary coverage.
remainingWork: Wire every direct, Omnigent, and OAuth-maintenance consumer through one exclusive profile lease.
Implement secret-free binding/generation/host contracts, OAuth-home materialization, exact-host preflight, and automatic routing.
Implement drain, ordered cleanup, reconciliation, checkpoint recovery, redacted diagnostics, and required boundary tests.
